preamble: The shift from [ʌ] to [ui] is a complex change involving both rounding and fronting of the glide. This typically represents a significant rearticulation of the vowel towards a high-front rounded diphthong area.

examples.note: Rounding of the nucleus and development of a front-closing glide.

sources: Ladefoged, P. (2001). A Course in Phonetics.
